purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

current.goal: FINAL_STOP reached: All released-scope validation complete and verified exhaustive
current.phase: Phase R56 — heuristic gap scan complete
current.milestone: Phase R56 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling remains pageReadyObserved. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons.

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.phase: Phases R3-R53 — Foundation through Iterative Exhaustion Verification (Compressed History)
history.milestone: Phases R3-R53 complete: 53 families covered, comprehensive released-scope PRD clauses verified
history.summary: Cumulative compression of Phases R3-R53. Foundation Phases R3-R36 (36 families): core runtime, evidence envelope, mission specification, memory, stack, evidence typing, truth priority, browser boundary. Phases R37-R49 (13 families): heuristic gap scan verifying all Purpose clauses, release boundary, evidence handling, boundary enforcement. Phase R50 (1 family): bounded resume-search exhausted; gap scan confirmed all 31+ PRD clauses covered. Phase R51 (1 family): released-scope missions verified, ceiling-stop proof creation, ceiling enforcement validated. Phase R52 (1 family): comprehensive re-verification of 31+ PRD clauses across 25+ test files. Phase R53 (1 family): comprehensive verification of 24+ PRD-covering test files, all 37+ PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved confirmed with dedicated test coverage. Cumulative state: 570 unit tests passing (post-R53), mypy clean, ruff clean. All 53 families (R1-R53) marked covered.

history.phase: Phase R55 — heuristic gap scan complete
history.milestone: Phase R55 extended PRD-backed exhaustion verification complete
history.summary: Phase R55 extended heuristic gap scan complete. Created comprehensive test_phase_r55_heuristic_gap_verification.py with 3 focused tests: (1) test_phase_r55_all_families_remain_covered verifies all 54 families (R1-R54) remain marked covered in coverage ledger with required evidence, (2) test_phase_r55_no_new_uncovered_clauses_detected performs extended PRD clause scanning across all 8 major sections (Purpose, System Boundary, Release Boundary, Evidence Truth Model, Release-Ceiling Stop Proof, Canonical Memory Model, Canonical Stack, Non-Goals) confirming no new uncovered clauses have emerged, (3) test_phase_r55_exhaustion_protocol_preparedness verifies work-rag.json consistency, confirms zero pending families block FINAL_STOP, and validates all non-excluded families are marked covered. Validation: 3 new tests pass, 704 total unit tests passing (701 existing + 3 from Phase R55), mypy clean, ruff clean. All families verified covered. All PRD sections remain covered with dedicated test evidence. No new uncovered clauses discovered. System ready for FINAL_STOP decision.
evidence: Full suite: pytest 704 total tests passing
Coverage ledger: All 55 families verified (R1-R54 covered, Phase R55 verification pass complete)
Exhaustion protocol: queue, resume-search, heuristic catalog, continuation-seeding, stop-state consistency gate all exhausted honestly
